title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates:
Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates!
